title: erysimum humile subsp. duriaei
intro: Erysimum humile subsp. duriaei is a subspecies of the Erysimum humile plant, commonly known as the dwarf wallflower or low wallflower, which is a flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects, which have been attributed to its essential oils and alkaloids. The health benefits of Erysimum humile subsp. duriaei include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and calm respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Erysimum humile subsp. duriaei can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
